groq.quirks: Free on_demand tier caps at 8000 TPM counting input + reserved max_tokens together. Keep input + max_tokens under 8000 or the call 413s and falls through. Replaced deprecated llama-3.3-70b-versatile (Groq decommission 2026-08-16).

cerebras.quirks: Standing cross-business fallback for the creative tier. No 8000 TPM ceiling, so it absorbs the Groq 413 case.
